name: Serra
description:
former Jedi apprentice trying to survive on Nar Shaadaa

Intros:
1) Cutting ties with her old life
2) Witnessing injustice
3) Starving in an alleyway
4) Looking for work
5) Encountering the Force ghost of her Jedi master
6) Being pursued
7) Thrown into the arena
creator: ZFK
